stages.concept:
# Unit 120: 5형식 문장의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **5형식 문장의 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> They **call** him Tom. (5형식 능동태)
> → He **is called** Tom. (수동태)
> 그는 Tom이라고 불린다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 5형식 수동태에서는 **목적격 보어가 그대로 남아요**!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 보어가 명사**:

> We **elected** her president.
> → She **was elected** president.
> 그녀가 회장으로 선출되었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 보어가 형용사**:

> The news **made** him happy.
> → He **was made** happy by the news.
> 그는 그 뉴스에 의해 행복해졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 보어가 to부정사**:

> She **asked** me **to help** her.
> → I **was asked** **to help** her.
> 나는 그녀를 도와달라는 요청을 받았다.

> He **told** me **to wait**.
> → I **was told** **to wait**.
> 나는 기다리라는 말을 들었다.

**Q. 다음 5형식 능동태 문장을 수동태로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르세요.**
"The news made her sad."
1. She was made sad by the news. ✅
2. Sad was made to her by the news.
3. She made sad by the news.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 수동태로 바꿀 때는 능동태의 목적어(her)를 주어(She)로 빼고, 동사(made)를 be동사+p.p.(was made)로 바꾸고 목적격 보어(sad)는 그 자리에 그대로 둔답니다! 행위자(by the news)는 맨 뒤로 보내고요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 5형식 수동태에서는 목적격 보어가 그대로 남는 거군요! 간단해요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 120: 5형식 문장의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 바꿔 쓰시오.
He kept his hands warm.
> **정답** His hands were kept warm by him.

---

**02.** We call him a genius.
> **정답** He is called a genius by us.

---

**03.** She painted the wall white.
> **정답** The wall was painted white by her.

---

**04.** They elected him president.
> **정답** He was elected president by them.

---

**05.** The news made her happy.
> **정답** She was made happy by the news.

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He is call a hero by everyone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** call → called

---

**07.** The wall was paint white by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** paint → painted

---

**08.** She was make happy by the gift.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** make → made

---

**09.** He was elect president by them.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** elect → elected

---

**10.** The room was keep clean by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** keep → kept

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 모두에게 영웅이라고 불린다.
He is a hero by everyone.
> **정답** called

---

**12.** 벽은 흰색으로 칠해졌다.
The wall was white.
> **정답** painted

---

**13.** 그녀는 그 소식에 행복해졌다.
She was happy by the news.
> **정답** made

---

**14.** 그는 회장으로 선출되었다.
He was president by them.
> **정답** elected

---

**15.** 방은 깨끗하게 유지되었다.
The room was clean by her.
> **정답** kept

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 천재라고 불린다.
He called is a genius
> **정답** He / is / called / a / genius

---

**17.** 벽은 파란색으로 칠해졌다.
The wall painted was blue
> **정답** The / wall / was / painted / blue

---

**18.** 그녀는 슬프게 되었다.
was She made sad by the news
> **정답** She / was / made / sad / by / the / news

---

**19.** 그는 대장으로 선출되었다.
was He elected captain
> **정답** He / was / elected / captain

---

**20.** 방은 따뜻하게 유지되었다.
The room kept was warm
> **정답** The / room / was / kept / warm
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 120: 5형식 문장의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Tom makes me happy.
Happy is made me by Tom
I am made to happy by Tom
I was made happy by Tom
I am made happy by Tom
> **정답** I am made happy by Tom

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
She calls Tom Honey.
Tom __________ by her.
was called Honey
is called Honey
is called to Honey
called Honey
> **정답** is called Honey

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
She allowed us to enter the room.
We were allowed to enter the room by she
We were allowed enter the room by her.
We were allowed to enter the room by her.
To enter the room were allowed to us by her.
> **정답** We were allowed to enter the room by her.

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
I made my daughter a scientist.
My daughter __________ by me.
was made to a scientist
was made for a scientist
is made a scientist
was made a scientist
> **정답** was made a scientist

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
We consider him brilliant.
He is considered to brilliant by us.
He is considered brilliant by us.
Brilliant is considered him by us.
He was considered brilliant by us.
> **정답** He is considered brilliant by us.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
My mom told me to clean the room.
I was told to clean the room by my mom.
I was told my mom to clean the room.
My mom was told me to clean the room.
I was told clean the room by mom.
> **정답** I was told to clean the room by my mom.

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
아이들은 부모에 의해 7시 이후 밖에 나가 노는 것이
금지되었다.
Children _____________ after 7 p.m. by their parents.
are forbidden to play outside
was forbidden to play outside
were forbidden play outside
were forbidden to play outside
> **정답** were forbidden to play outside

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 강아지는 그녀에 의해 Bobby라고 이름지어졌다.
The dog ____________ by her.
Bobby was named
was named Bobby
is named Bobby
were named Bobby
> **정답** was named Bobby

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 시민들에 의해 시장으로 선출되었다.
Tom was elected the mayor by the citizens.
Tom was elected for the mayor by the
citizens.
The mayor was elected to Tom by the
citizens.
Tom was elected to the mayor by the
citizens.
> **정답** Tom was elected the mayor by the citizens.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
참가자들은 진행자에 의해 설문지를 작성해 달라고
요구받았다.
Participants were asked to fill out a
questionnaire by the host.
A questionnaire were asked to fill out
participants by the host.
Participants were asked of fill out a
questionnaire by the host.
Participants were asked by fill out a
questionnaire by the host.
> **정답** Participants were asked to fill out a questionnaire by the host.

---

**11.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The windows were kept open by them.
They kept the windows open.
They kept the windows to open.
They kept the windows for open.
They keep the windows open.
> **정답** They kept the windows open.

---

**12.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The place is considered a landmark by us.
We consider the place by a landmark.
We considered the place a landmark.
We consider the place a landmark.
The place considered a landmark by us.
> **정답** We consider the place a landmark.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The baby was named Tom by his
grandfather.
She is thought to be honest by them.
His cat is called to Nabi by him.
They are allowed to go outside by their father.
> **정답** His cat is called to Nabi by him.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My room is kept clean by me.
They are allowed enter the building by him.
My son was made a doctor by me.
She is called a baby by us.
> **정답** They are allowed enter the building by him.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom was encouraged to study English by the
teacher.
He is expected elected a class president.
She is asked to filling this bucket by us.
They are required take a test by him.
> **정답** Tom was encouraged to study English by the teacher.

---

**16.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
This tree is believed to bring good fortune by the local
people.
To bring good fortune believes this tree by the
local people.
The local people believe this tree to bring
good fortune.
The local people believe to this tree to bring
good fortune.
To bring good fortune believes to this tree by
the local people.
> **정답** The local people believe this tree to bring good fortune.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He was asked move his
luggage by the staff.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** move → to move

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They were made sadly by the
news.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sadly → sad

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is elected to the leader
by us.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to the leader → the leader

---

**20.** 다음 문장에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
Nightingale born in 1820. She
became a nurse despite of her parents'
opposition. In the Crimean War, she saved many
wounded soldiers. And she called the
white angel by many people.
• opposition 반대
> **정답** was born, became, was called
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 120 5형식 문장의 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The team made the program attractive.
→The program  (     )   (     )   (     )  by the team.
• attractive 매력적인
정답 was, made, attractive

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The manager did not allow us to use the facility.
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the facility
by the manager.
• facility 시설
정답 were, not, allowed, to, use

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
They call him Jamie.
He  (     )   (     )   (     )  by them.
정답 is, called, Jamie

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The story encourages us to work hard.
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  hard by the story.
• encourage 격려하다, 용기를 주다
정답 are, encouraged, to, work

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 책은 영화로 유명해졌다.
힌트 (     ) make, popular, movie
The book  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 was, made, popular, by, the, movie

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 그녀에 의해 그 실험에 참가하도록 요구되었다.
힌트 (     ) require, participate
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the experiment
by her.
정답 were, required, to, participate

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 어머니에게 방청소를 하라고 들었다.
힌트 (     ) tell, clean
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the room by my
mother.
정답 was, told, to, clean

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 그녀에게 영어를 배운다.
힌트 (     ) teach, English
We  (     )   (     )   (     )  by her.
정답 are, taught, English

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: What did she ask of you?
B: We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  at the
playground by seven by her.
힌트 (     ) ask, gather
정답 were, asked, to, gather

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
A: Can we play the computer game, mom?
B: You  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  computer
games for an hour. [allow, play]
정답 are, allowed, to, play

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 120: 5형식 문장의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Music makes me relaxed.
Relaxed is made me by music.
I am made to relaxed by music.
I was made relaxed by music.
I am made relaxed by music.
> 정답: I am made relaxed by music.

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She calls Tom Buddy.
Tom __________ by her. was called Buddy is called Buddy is called to Buddy called Buddy
> 정답: is called Buddy

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
He allowed us to use the lab.
We were allowed to use the lab by he.
We were allowed use the lab by him.
We were allowed to use the lab by him.
To use the lab were allowed to us by him.
> 정답: We were allowed to use the lab by him.

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I made my son an engineer.
My son __________ by me.
was made to an engineer was made for an engineer is made an engineer was made an engineer
> 정답: was made an engineer

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
We consider her talented.
She is considered to talented by us.
She is considered talented by us.
Talented is considered her by us.
She was considered talented by us.
> 정답: She is considered talented by us.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
My dad told me to wash the dishes.
I was told to wash the dishes by my dad.
I was told my dad to wash the dishes.
My dad was told me to wash the dishes.
I was told wash the dishes by dad.
> 정답: I was told to wash the dishes by my dad.

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
학생들은 선생님에 의해 8시 이후 핸드폰 사용이 금지되었다.
Students _____________ after 8 p.
m. by their teacher. are forbidden to use phones was forbidden to use phones were forbidden use phones were forbidden to use phones
> 정답: were forbidden to use phones

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 고양이는 그에 의해 Lucky라고 이름지어졌다.
The cat ____________ by him.
Lucky was named was named Lucky is named Lucky were named Lucky
> 정답: was named Lucky

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 학생들에 의해 반장으로 선출되었다.
Tom was elected the class president by the students.
Tom was elected for the class president by the students.
The class president was elected to Tom by the students.
Tom was elected to the class president by the students.
> 정답: Tom was elected the class president by the students.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
관객들은 진행자에 의해 설문지를 작성해 달라고 요구받았다.
The audience were asked to fill out a survey by the host.
A survey were asked to fill out the audience by the host.
The audience were asked of fill out a survey by the host.
The audience were asked by fill out a survey by the host.
> 정답: The audience were asked to fill out a survey by host.

---

**11.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The doors were kept closed by them.
They kept the doors closed.
They kept the doors to closed.
They kept the doors for closed.
They keep the doors closed.
> 정답: They kept the doors closed.

---

**12.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The building is considered a landmark by us.
We consider the building by a landmark.
We considered the building a landmark.
We consider the building a landmark.
The building considered a landmark by us.
> 정답: We consider the building a landmark.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The puppy was named Max by his owner.
She is thought to be honest by them.
His hamster is called to Cookie by him.
They are allowed to go outside by their mother.
> 정답: His hamster is called to Cookie by him.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My desk is kept clean by me.
They are allowed enter the library by her.
My daughter was made a scientist by me.
She is called a genius by us.
> 정답: They are allowed enter the library by her.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom was encouraged to learn Korean by the teacher. teacher.
He is expected elected a team captain.
She is asked to filling this form by us.
They are required take an exam by him.
> 정답: Tom was encouraged to learn Korean by the teacher.

---

**16.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
This fountain is believed to bring good luck by the local people.
To bring good luck believes this fountain by the local people.
The local people believe this fountain to bring good luck.
The local people believe to this fountain to bring good luck.
